Biography
Biography
Clifton Forlines is an associate research professor in the Khoury College of Computer Sciences at Northeastern University, based in Portland, Maine.
Forlines's research primarily focuses on human–computer interaction. He is affiliated with the Northeastern University Visualization Consortium and has published in ACM and CHI. Prior to joining Northeastern in 2021, he was a startup founder and was involved in industrial and academic research.
Despite entering a career in computing, Forlines enjoys building things with his hands.
